content.text:
<timestamp>Saturday, Jun 27, 2026, 5:43 PM (UTC+2)</timestamp>
<user_query>
Explore /home/charles2/sailly-browser-demo to understand the project structure. Specifically:
1. Is there a frontend/website component in this repo?
2. Look for any pages/, app/, or components/ directories
3. Check if there's a package.json that includes Next.js
4. Check if there's a separate website directory vs the voice agent server
5. Look for any existing sailly.de or landing page content

Return the full directory tree (top 3 levels) and any relevant findings about the website code.
</user_query>

input.description: List top 3 levels of directory tree

input.final_summary: Explored the full project structure of /home/charles2/sailly-browser-demo. It is a monorepo with a Python voice agent server (backend) and a Next.js dashboard app. No separate website or landing page for sailly.de exists in this repo; the dashboard is the only frontend, deployed at dashboard.sailly.tech.
input.completed_subtitle: Explored project structure and website code

content.text:
Here is the complete exploration report for `/home/charles2/sailly-browser-demo`.

---

## 1. Full Directory Tree (Top 3 Levels)

```
/home/charles2/sailly-browser-demo/
├── agent-vault/
│   ├── call_batches/
│   ├── components/
│   ├── failure-catalog.md
│   ├── fetch_live_calls.sh
│   └── handoff.md, lessons.md
├── apps/
│   └── dashboard/                          <-- THE FRONTEND (Next.js 14)
│       ├── app/                            <-- Next.js App Router pages
│       │   ├── agent/page.tsx
│       │   ├── analytics/page.tsx
│       │   ├── builder/page.tsx + layout.tsx
│       │   ├── call-analysis/page.tsx
│       │   ├── calls/page.tsx, calls/[id]/page.tsx
│       │   ├── checkpoints/page.tsx
│       │   ├── code-graph/page.tsx + components/
│       │   ├── compliance/page.tsx
│       │   ├── conversations/page.tsx
│       │   ├── costs/page.tsx
│       │   ├── crucial-fix/page.tsx
│       │   ├── demo-call/page.tsx + layout.tsx
│       │   ├── fix-validation/page.tsx
│       │   ├── gdpr/page.js
│       │   ├── live-calls/page.tsx, live-calls/[sid]/trace/page.tsx
│       │   ├── login/page.tsx + layout.tsx
│       │   ├── overview/page.tsx
│       │   ├── pipeline/page.tsx
│       │   ├── quality/page.tsx
│       │   ├── quality-gate/page.tsx
│       │   ├── restaurants/page.tsx
│       │   ├── tenants/new/page.tsx
│       │   ├── testing/page.tsx
│       │   ├── validation/page.tsx
│       │   ├── webhooks/page.tsx
│       │   ├── layout.tsx, page.tsx (redirects to /overview), globals.css
│       ├── components/
│       │   ├── LayoutShell.tsx
│       │   ├── PipelineVisualizer.tsx
│       │   ├── SessionWarning.tsx
│       │   ├── Sidebar.tsx
│       │   └── ui/ (audio-player, transcript-viewer, button, waveform, bar-visualizer)
│       ├── lib/
│       │   ├── api/ (codegraph-client.ts, debugger-client.ts)
│       │   ├── builder/
│       │   └── codegraph/
│       ├── public/ (icon.svg, pcm16-processor.js)
│       ├── scripts/ (code-graph-watchdog.sh)
│       ├── types/
│       ├── .next/                           <-- build output
│       ├── package.json                     <-- Next.js 14, React 18, Tailwind, Recharts, etc.
│       ├── next.config.mjs
│       ├── tailwind.config.ts
│       └── README.md
├── audit/  (FROZEN_PLAN.md, etc.)
├── call_reports/
├── configs/
│   ├── CALL_FLOW_CONTRACT.yaml
│   └── tenants/ (doboo.yaml, pizzeria_napoli.yaml)
├── docs/
├── scripts/ (git-hooks/, insert scenarios, gen goldens, etc.)
├── server/                                 <-- PYTHON VOICE AGENT BACKEND
│   ├── brain/                              <-- Core FSM, pipeline, intent, slots
│   │   ├── conversation_fsm.py
│   │   ├── conversation_state.py
│   │   ├── v4_pipeline_clean.py
│   │   ├── slot_extractor.py
│   │   ├── temporal_extractor.py
│   │   └── ... (39 files total)
│   ├── tests/                              <-- pytest suites
│   ├── tools/handlers/                     <-- Tool implementations
│   ├── validation/                         <-- Validation/regression loop
│   ├── brain_service.py
│   ├── main.py                             <-- FastAPI entry point
│   └── sailly_gemini_tts.py
├── systemd/ (service + timer unit files)
├── test-infra/caller-bot-v4/
├── tools/ (executor.py, sms_service.py, layer2_commit_gate.py)
├── IMPLEMENTATION_COMPLETE.md
├── IMPLEMENTATION_STATUS.md
└── LIVE_AUDIO_TEST_CHECKLIST.md
```

There are also directories for `.cursor/`, `agent-vault/`, `audit/`, and `.pytest_cache/` (not expanded above for brevity).

---

## 2. Is There a Frontend/Website Component?

**Yes.** The frontend lives at `apps/dashboard/` -- it is an **internal operations dashboard** (not a public-facing marketing website). It is titled "Sailly Command Center -- Voice AI Operations" and deployed at `https://dashboard.sailly.tech`.

---

## 3. Pages, App, and Components Directories

| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `apps/dashboard/app/` | **28 Next.js App Router page files** (`page.tsx`) covering overview, pipeline, conversations, costs, analytics, demo-call, restaurants, agent config, quality gate, compliance, webhooks, login, etc. |
| `apps/dashboard/components/` | Shared components: `Sidebar.tsx`, `LayoutShell.tsx`, `PipelineVisualizer.tsx`, `SessionWarning.tsx` + `ui/` subfolder with audio/transcript visualizers |
| No `pages/` directory exists (uses the Next.js `app/` router exclusively) |

---

## 4. Next.js in package.json

**Confirmed.** The file `apps/dashboard/package.json` at line 30 declares:

```30:30:apps/dashboard/package.json
    "next": "14.2.35",
```

Key dependencies: `next` 14.2.35, `react` 18, `typescript` 5, `tailwindcss` 3, `recharts` 3, `framer-motion` 12, `lucide-react`, `zustand` 5, `react-hook-form`, `wavesurfer.js`, `@radix-ui/*` components, and `reactflow`. It is configured for `output: 'standalone'` in `next.config.mjs` with reverse proxies to the voice agent backend (`http://127.0.0.1:8080`) for `/api/builder/*` routes.

---

## 5. Separate Website Directory vs Voice Agent Server

**There is NO separate website or landing page directory.**

The repo has exactly one frontend: `apps/dashboard/`. The voice agent is the Python server at `server/` (FastAPI on port 8080). There is:
- No `website/`, `landing/`, `www/`, or `public-site/` directory
- No separate `pages/` directory
- No `apps/` subdirectory other than `apps/dashboard/`
- No `voice_agent_web/` directory anywhere

The Next.js dashboard proxies its `/api/builder/*` routes through to the voice agent backend (`localhost:8080`). There is also a `VALIDATION_DASHBOARD_ORIGIN` proxy for a separate validation dashboard on port 8090.

---

## 6. Existing sailly.de or Landing Page Content

**There is NO sailly.de landing page in this repository.** The only references to `sailly.de` anywhere in the codebase are:

1. **`apps/dashboard/app/demo-call/page.tsx`** (lines 600-602) -- Comments referencing `sailly.de` as visual design inspiration for the demo-call phone UI:

```600:602:apps/dashboard/app/demo-call/page.tsx
        {/* ── Left: Phone UI (sailly.de style) ──────────────────────────────── */}
          {/* Glass card phone — matches sailly.de/de design */}
```

2. **`apps/dashboard/tailwind.config.ts`** (line 12) -- A comment about brand colors referencing `sailly.de`:

```12:12:apps/dashboard/tailwind.config.ts
        // Sailly brand colors (from sailly.de)
```

No search results for `sailly.de` or `landing` found in any configuration files, HTML, or other source files. The `sailly.de` website **lives in a completely separate codebase** (not within this repo), and this repo only contains the voice AI backend + internal operations dashboard.

---

## Summary

| Question | Answer |
|----------|--------|
| Frontend/website in this repo? | Yes -- `apps/dashboard/`, a Next.js 14 operations dashboard |
| `pages/`, `app/`, or `components/` directories? | `app/` (Next.js App Router with 28 pages), `components/` (shared UI), no `pages/` |
| Next.js in package.json? | Yes -- `next: 14.2.35` with React 18, Tailwind, Recharts, Framer Motion |
| Separate website vs server? | No -- the server is Python (`server/`), the dashboard is the only frontend (`apps/dashboard/`). No separate website directory. |
| Existing sailly.de/landing page? | None in this repo. `sailly.de` is referenced only as a design inspiration in comments. The public landing page is in a separate, external repository. |
